TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Scott_Brooks, title = Scott_Brooks, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Scott_Brooks} }

S.FORM: Scott Brooks sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1965, ryax sa tay 31 nqu tay 7, Scott Brooks, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Scott Brooks sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1965, ryax sa tay 31 nqu tay 7, Scott Brooks, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: s~ɕʦ~ʨott βrooks~ɕ s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, s~ɕʦ~ʨott βrooks~ɕ, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
